claude.notes: Claude Code can replace the system prompt via --system-prompt-file when the user owns the session. Reference only; fable ships no Claude executor and does not migrate Claude identity/tool assumptions.

opencode.notes: Assembled prompt is passed to opencode run. The host opencode system prompt remains authoritative; fable overlays governance.

codex.notes: Design only in this milestone. Overlay via AGENTS.md / plugin / profile; host Codex system and tool policy remain authoritative.

kimi.notes: Design only in this milestone. Overlay via --skills-dir or prompt prelude; host system prompt remains authoritative.

grok.notes: Advisory/review-oriented adapter. Design only; overlay via prompt prelude; no executor in this milestone.

copilot.notes: Design only in this milestone. Overlay via AGENTS/custom instructions / --agent / --plugin-dir; host system prompt remains authoritative.

agy.notes: Generic opaque-host fallback (agy/Antigravity-like). Overlay only; never assume system replacement until proven user-owned and safe.
